label: E-tag
note: Synthetic 13-residue epitope/affinity tag GAPVPYPDPLEPR derived from M13 bacteriophage g3p (gene III protein). It is the C-terminal detection/purification tag of the pCANTAB 5E phage-display vector (Pharmacia/GE), used to track and purify scFv-g3p fusion proteins and free scFv/Fab fragments via anti-E-tag monoclonal antibody. Conceptually based on the g3p-peptide epitope recognized by mAb 10C3 (Beckmann et al., 1998). Note: this string is also coincidentally present in human osteocalcin (UniProt P02818); that match is unrelated to the engineered tag's origin.

provenance.sequence_source: AF130864.1 (pG8SAET phagemid vector, deposited 1999-05-06), misc_feature 316..354 annotated "E-tag"; independent efetch + translation yields GAPVPYPDPLEPR, 100% identity over all 13 aa

functional_claims.label: Detection/affinity epitope recognized by anti-E-tag monoclonal antibody

value.minimal_epitope_concept: 11-aa g3p epitope (g3p positions 292-302), mAb 10C3, Kd ~6.8e-10 M
